languages.text: Ты якшался с ксеносами. Ты увешал себя их железками и потерял человеческий вид. Ты посмел направить оружие на меня, Диодаса аф Иррамона, верного слугу Бога-Императора.

traits.locale_text: Ты якшался с ксеносами. Ты увешал себя их железками и потерял человеческий вид. Ты посмел направить оружие на меня, Диодаса аф Иррамона, верного слугу Бога-Императора.

languages.text: "You consorted with the xenos. You arrayed yourself in their pieces of iron and lost your human aspect. You dared to point a weapon at me, Diodas af Irramon, faithful servant of the God-Emperor."
languages.original_text: Ты якшался с ксеносами. Ты увешал себя их железками и потерял человеческий вид. Ты посмел направить оружие на меня, Диодаса аф Иррамона, верного слугу Бога-Императора.

traits.locale_text: "You consorted with the xenos. You arrayed yourself in their pieces of iron and lost your human aspect. You dared to point a weapon at me, Diodas af Irramon, faithful servant of the God-Emperor."
"You consorted with the xenos. You arrayed yourself in their pieces of iron and lost your human aspect. You dared to point a weapon at me, Diodas af Irramon, faithful servant of the God-Emperor."
"You consorted with the xenos. You arrayed yourself in their pieces of iron and lost your human aspect. You dared to point a weapon at me, Diodas af Irramon, faithful servant of the God-Emperor."

languages.text: "Ihr habt mit den Xenos verkehrt. Ihr habt Euch in ihr Eisen gekleidet und Eurer Menschlichkeit entsagt. Ihr habt es gewagt, eine Waffe auf mich, Diodas af Irramon, einen treuen Diener des Gottimperators, zu richten."
languages.original_text: "You consorted with the xenos. You arrayed yourself in their pieces of iron and lost your human aspect. You dared to point a weapon at me, Diodas af Irramon, faithful servant of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt mit den Xenos verkehrt. Ihr habt Euch in ihr Eisen gekleidet und Eurer Menschlichkeit entsagt. Ihr habt es gewagt, eine Waffe auf mich, Diodas af Irramon, einen treuen Diener des Gottimperators, zu richten."

languages.text: “你与异形勾结，将自己裹在他们的铁皮里，失去了人的模样。我，狄奥达斯·阿夫·伊拉蒙，乃神皇忠实的仆从，而你竟敢将武器对准我。”
languages.original_text: "You consorted with the xenos. You arrayed yourself in their pieces of iron and lost your human aspect. You dared to point a weapon at me, Diodas af Irramon, faithful servant of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: “你与异形勾结，将自己裹在他们的铁皮里，失去了人的模样。我，狄奥达斯·阿夫·伊拉蒙，乃神皇忠实的仆从，而你竟敢将武器对准我。”

languages.text: « Vous avez pactisé avec les xénos, revêtu leurs atours de métal et perdu votre forme humaine. Vous avez osé me menacer de votre arme, moi, Diodas af Irramon, fidèle serviteur de l'Empereur-Dieu. »
languages.original_text: "You consorted with the xenos. You arrayed yourself in their pieces of iron and lost your human aspect. You dared to point a weapon at me, Diodas af Irramon, faithful servant of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez pactisé avec les xénos, revêtu leurs atours de métal et perdu votre forme humaine. Vous avez osé me menacer de votre arme, moi, Diodas af Irramon, fidèle serviteur de l'Empereur-Dieu. »

languages.text: «Ha confraternizado con los xenos. Se ha ataviado con sus piezas de hierro y ha perdido su aspecto humano. Incluso ha osado apuntarme con un arma a mí, Diodas af Irramon, un siervo fiel del Dios Emperador».
languages.original_text: "You consorted with the xenos. You arrayed yourself in their pieces of iron and lost your human aspect. You dared to point a weapon at me, Diodas af Irramon, faithful servant of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: «Ha confraternizado con los xenos. Se ha ataviado con sus piezas de hierro y ha perdido su aspecto humano. Incluso ha osado apuntarme con un arma a mí, Diodas af Irramon, un siervo fiel del Dios Emperador».

languages.text: "Zenolarla iş birliği yaptın. Kendini onların demir parçalarıyla donattın ve insan görünümünü kaybettin. Sen bana, Tanrı İmparator'un sadık hizmetkârı Diodas af İrramon'a silah doğrultma cüretini gösterdin."
languages.original_text: "You consorted with the xenos. You arrayed yourself in their pieces of iron and lost your human aspect. You dared to point a weapon at me, Diodas af Irramon, faithful servant of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: "Zenolarla iş birliği yaptın. Kendini onların demir parçalarıyla donattın ve insan görünümünü kaybettin. Sen bana, Tanrı İmparator'un sadık hizmetkârı Diodas af İrramon'a silah doğrultma cüretini gösterdin."

languages.text: 「異種族と交わり、彼らの鉄の鎧を身につけ、人間性を失った。神皇帝の忠実なしもべであるディオダス・ア・イルラモンに武器を向けたとは。」
languages.original_text: "You consorted with the xenos. You arrayed yourself in their pieces of iron and lost your human aspect. You dared to point a weapon at me, Diodas af Irramon, faithful servant of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: 「異種族と交わり、彼らの鉄の鎧を身につけ、人間性を失った。神皇帝の忠実なしもべであるディオダス・ア・イルラモンに武器を向けたとは。」
